name: Pizza Dough#4
recipeInstructions:
1. Place a large mixing bowl in warm water; let it heat.
This helps the yeast activate properly.
2. Pour the warm water into the bowl and sprinkle in the yeast.
Use a fork to stir gently until the yeast is dissolved and the mixture is light beige.
3. Add olive oil, sugar, and salt, then stir gently until well combined.
4. Gradually add flour (one cup at a time) and mix with a wooden spoon until the dough no longer sticks to the bowl.
Only add as much flour needed for the dough to be workable without being overly dry.
5. Remove the dough from the bowl and place it back in the warm water.
Cover and let it rise for at least one hour, or several hours for a more flavorful crust.
6. After rising, shape the dough into your desired form (thick crust, deep dish, or stuffed pizza).
Note: Be careful not to overwork the dough, as this can make it tough after cooking.
